data.body: Cycle: 519 submit 409 (was on pre-508 base). CI failures diagnosed: 517(#6) test_graph_build_scales_linearly perf-flake (unrelated; rebase/recheck); 518(#8) test_environment_resolution fails on DEFAULT-suite (no [agents]/pydantic -> abstain not refuted) -> #8 subagent resumed to add pytest.importorskip guards. Rebased 509 515 519 onto current main (294f3526e=508 merge) for pipeline. 514 516 already on current tip CI-ing. Still to rebase later: 513, 517(recheck flake), 518(after fix).
